_comment_disclaimer: NOT a cmt binary parity fixture.

True cmt binary parity is deferred to Slice 17B (T-30).
Slice 17A audit trail: documents the hybrid scalar+quat test input used by
Tests hard-code these doubles in C++ to avoid JSON-parse rounding; this file
serves as reviewer audit trail and as the payload Slice 17B's cmt binary parity

quat_feature_layout: row = pose, cols = (x, y, z, w)

axis_angle_closed_forms.pose_1: 60 deg around +Y  : (0, sin(30 deg), 0, cos(30 deg)) — pure twist about Y
axis_angle_closed_forms.pose_2: 30 deg around +X  : (sin(15 deg), 0, 0, cos(15 deg)) — swing only (twist identity) about Y
